title: Toggle Visibility
description: Create a component that shows or hides content using Angular property binding and structural directives.
checklist: Use *ngIf to conditionally render the message
Switch the button label between Hide and Show

hints.guide: Import Component and define the Angular component metadata
Create a boolean state property for visibility
Add a toggle method that flips the visible property
Use *ngIf to render the message only when visible
Use Angular interpolation to switch the button label
